---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
pagetitle: "CV — Arvind Karunakaran"
description: "Curriculum vitae of Arvind Karunakaran, including appointments, education, and honors and awards."
---

[Download CV (PDF)](files/cv/cv.pdf){.btn-doc .no-underline}

::: {.cv-embed}
<object data="files/cv/cv.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="600" aria-label="Curriculum vitae PDF">
  <p>Your browser cannot display the embedded PDF.
  <a href="files/cv/cv.pdf">Download the CV (PDF)</a> instead.</p>
</object>
:::

## Appointments

::: {.stack-list}
- **Assistant Professor of Management Science & Engineering**, and by courtesy
  of Sociology — Stanford University
- Core faculty — Center for Work, Technology, and Organization (WTO)
- Core faculty — Stanford Technology Ventures Program (STVP)
- Faculty affiliate — Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI (HAI)
- Faculty affiliate — Digital Economy Lab
:::

## Education

::: {.stack-list}
- **Ph.D.**, MIT Sloan School of Management, 2018
:::

## Honors & Awards

::: {.stack-list}
- [2025]{.year} — Thinkers50 Radar
- [2025]{.year} — Ascendant Scholar, Western Academy of Management
- [2025]{.year} — Best Published Paper Award, Communications, Information Technologies, & Media Sociology Section, American Sociological Association
- [2025]{.year} — Gerard J. Tellis Best Junior Faculty Paper Award, 5th Artificial Intelligence in Management (AIM) Conference
- [2024]{.year} — W. Richard Scott Article Award, Organizations, Occupations, and Work (OOW) Section, American Sociological Association
- [2024]{.year} — Responsible Research in Management Award, RRBM and Academy of Management Fellows Group
- [2024]{.year} — Future of Organizations Inaugural Fellowship, Organization Design Community
- [2023]{.year} — Runner-up, ASQ Best Paper based on a Dissertation
- [2023]{.year} — LERA/AILR Best Papers, Labor and Employment Relations Association Annual Meeting
- [2023]{.year} — Fellowship, CASBS Summer Institute
- [2023]{.year} — Finalist, Best Conference Paper Award, OMT Division, AOM Annual Meeting
- [2022]{.year} — Jagdeep & Roshni Singh Faculty Fellow, Stanford University
- [2022]{.year} — Best Published Paper, Communications, Information Technologies, and Media Sociology, American Sociological Association
- [2022]{.year} — Giarratani Rising Star Award, Industry Studies Association
- [2022]{.year} — Runner-up, Best Paper in Innovation and Entrepreneurship, Industry Studies Association
- [2019]{.year} — William H. Newman Best Dissertation Paper, Academy of Management
- [2019]{.year} — Louis Pondy Best Dissertation Paper, OMT Division, Academy of Management
- [2019]{.year} — Honorable Mention, Junior Theorist Award, Theory Section, American Sociological Association
- [2019]{.year} — Gerardine DeSanctis Best Dissertation Paper, CTO Division, Academy of Management
- [2019]{.year} — Best Conference Paper, CTO Division, Academy of Management
- [2019]{.year} — Emerging Scholar in Innovation and Entrepreneurship, Industry Studies Association
- [2019 · 2021 · 2022]{.year} — LERA Best Papers, Labor and Employment Relations Association
- [2019]{.year} — Finalist, Best Submission with Practical Implications, MOC Division / Behavioral Science and Policy Association, AOM
- [2019]{.year} — Runner-up, Best Working Paper Award, Technology, Innovation Management, and Entrepreneurship, INFORMS
- [2018]{.year} — Best Doctoral Dissertation, Association for Information Systems (AIS) / Association for Computing Machinery (ACM)
- [2018]{.year} — Honorable Mention, Shils-Coleman Memorial Award, Theory Section, American Sociological Association
- [2017]{.year} — Best Graduate Student Paper, Communications, Information Technologies, and Media Sociology, American Sociological Association
- [2017]{.year} — Best Paper (Macro Track), East Coast Doctoral Conference (Columbia University and NYU)
- [2017]{.year} — Ethnography Fellow, Department of Sociology, University of Chicago
- [2016]{.year} — Donald R. Cressey Award for the Most Outstanding Dissertation Project, Horowitz Foundation for Social Policy
- [2013]{.year} — Above & Beyond Call of Duty Award (top 2% of reviewers), OMT Division, AOM
- [2012]{.year} — Vincent Cerf Graduate Student Paper Award, Design Science Research in Information Systems and Technologies
:::
